identity.canonical_title: Paper XI Acoustic Metric Ruler Premise

theory.canonical_statement: Paper XI formalizes the disciplined sound-before-light premise as acoustic pressure modes setting the metric ruler before freely travelling CMB light.
theory.technical_interpretation: Paper XI Sound Before Light carrier: Paper XI formalizes the disciplined sound-before-light premise as acoustic pressure modes setting the metric ruler before freely travelling CMB light.
theory.source_lineage: Extracted from Paper XI Sound Before Light.

latex_blocks: \boxed{\ \text{Acoustic pressure modes set the metric ruler before the oldest freely travelling light was released.}\ }
